title: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase
summary_full: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.
summary_public: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.
